final_prompt.prompt: Static Facebook native ad. Top headline bold italic: "Tu te grattes en cachette depuis des années ?" Subheadline smaller: "Les crèmes soulagent 3 jours. Puis ça recommence." Center: two DermaVe green soap bars product photo side by side. Large price display: strikethrough "59,80€" in red, bold "17€ / savon" in dark. Badge bottom-right: "Économisé 35€ !!!" in orange rounded pill. Bottom CTA bar green: "1 ACHETÉ = 1 OFFERT". White background, green (#6aaa64) and orange (#f0a500) accents, flat urgency style [@image:#1:Capture d’écran 2026-03-27 150251] ecriture de l'aimage a la main
